action_set_definitions.name: query_performance_logs
action_set_definitions.description: Searches system logs and database statistics for slow queries associated with a specific keyword or dashboard name.

dashboard_name.description: The name of the dashboard to search for in logs.

example_output.slow_query: SELECT product_id, SUM(amount) FROM sales_records WHERE region = 'GLOBAL' GROUP BY 1;

action_set_definitions.name: get_schema_details
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the schema, column definitions, and existing indexes for a specific table.

table_name.description: The name of the table to inspect.

action_set_definitions.name: explain_query_plan
action_set_definitions.description: Executes an EXPLAIN ANALYZE (simulated) to provide the estimated execution cost and the physical plan steps.

action_set_definitions.name: create_index
action_set_definitions.description: Creates a B-Tree index on specified columns to optimize data retrieval.

index_name.description: A unique name for the new index.

table_or_view_name.description: The table or materialized view to create the index on.

columns.description: List of columns to include in the index.

action_set_definitions.name: setup_materialized_view
action_set_definitions.description: Creates a materialized view to store pre-aggregated data. Supports staleness config and concurrent background refreshes.

view_name.description: The name of the materialized view.

source_query.description: The original slow query used to populate the view.

enable_concurrent_refresh.description: Set to true to use non-blocking refresh (requires a unique index on the view).

state_description.current_query: The current SQL string undergoing optimization.
state_description.database_schema: Information about tables, columns, types, and existing indexes.
state_description.execution_plan: The current simulated physical execution plan (e.g., Sequential Scan, Index Scan).
state_description.estimated_cost: The numerical cost value assigned by the simulated optimizer.
state_description.statistics: Metadata such as table cardinality and column selectivity.

task_initial_state.current_query: SELECT * FROM merchants WHERE status = 'active' LIMIT 10

performance_audit_log.label: Consolidated Global Revenue
performance_audit_log.query: SELECT merchant_id, SUM(amount) FROM txn_live_v4 GROUP BY merchant_id

performance_audit_log.label: Legacy Revenue Audit
performance_audit_log.query: SELECT m_id, SUM(amount) FROM txn_archive_2022 GROUP BY m_id

performance_audit_log.label: Dev Dashboard
performance_audit_log.query: SELECT merchant_id, SUM(amount) FROM txn_staging_test GROUP BY merchant_id
